    throw new Error(

_c = SectorBar;
function MiniSectorBar({ segments }) {
  if (!segments || segments.length === 0) return null;
  const s1 = segments.slice(0, 7);
  const s2 = segments.slice(7, 15);
  const s3 = segments.slice(15, 22);
  const blockStyle = (s) => ({
    width: 4,
    height: 14,
    borderRadius: 1,
    background: s === 2049 ? "#27c93f" : s === 2048 ? "#ffd700" : s === 2051 ? "#a855f7" : "#30363d",
    opacity: s === 2049 || s === 2048 || s === 2051 ? 1 : 0.25
  });
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "mini-sector-bar", children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "sector-group", children: [

        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",

_c3 = TimingTower;
function TelemetryChart({ data, yKey, label, color, height, trackLength, refData, step, fill, corners }) {
  _s();
  var containerRef = useRef(null);
  var [chartWidth, setChartWidth] = useState(500);
  useEffect(function() {
    function measure() {
      if (containerRef.current) {
        var w = containerRef.current.getBoundingClientRect().width;
        if (w > 0) setChartWidth(w);
      }
    }
    measure();
    window.addEventListener("resize", measure);
    return function() {
      window.removeEventListener("resize", measure);
    };
  }, []);
  if (!data || data.length < 2) {
    return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { ref: containerRef, className: "no-session", style: { height: height || 100 }, children: "No data" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 259,
      columnNumber: 12
    }, this);
  }
  var h = height || 100;
  var pad = { top: 16, right: 12, bottom: 20, left: 40 };
  var iw = chartWidth - pad.left - pad.right;
  var ih = h - pad.top - pad.bottom;
  var pts = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var p = data[i];
    if (p[yKey] == null) continue;
    var dist = p.distance != null ? p.distance : i * 10;
    var val = p[yKey];
    if (yKey === "brake") {
      if (typeof val === "boolean") val = val ? 1 : 0;
      else if (typeof val === "number") val = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, val));
    }
    pts.push({ distance: dist, value: val, lap: p.lap });
  }
  if (pts.length < 2) {
    return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { ref: containerRef, className: "no-session", style: { height: h }, children: "Waiting for data..." }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 299,
      columnNumber: 12
    }, this);
  }
  var refPts = [];
  if (refData && refData.length > 0) {
    for (var i = 0; i < refData.length; i++) {
      var p = refData[i];
      if (p[yKey] == null) continue;
      var dist = p.distance != null ? p.distance : i * 10;
      var val = p[yKey];
      if (yKey === "brake") {
        if (typeof val === "boolean") val = val ? 1 : 0;
        else if (typeof val === "number") val = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, val));
      }
      refPts.push({ distance: dist, value: val, lap: p.lap });
    }
  }
  var laps = [];
  var cur = [];
  var prevLap = pts.length > 0 ? pts[0].lap : void 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < pts.length; i++) {
    var p = pts[i];
    if (p.lap !== prevLap) {
      if (cur.length > 0) laps.push(cur);
      cur = [];
      prevLap = p.lap;
    }
    cur.push({ distance: p.distance, value: p.value });
  }
  if (cur.length > 0) laps.push(cur);
  if (laps.length > 0) {
    laps = [laps[laps.length - 1]];
  } else {
    laps = [pts.map(function(p2) {
      return { distance: p2.distance, value: p2.value };
    })];
  }
  var refLaps = [];
  if (refPts.length > 0) {
    var cur2 = [];
    var prevLap2 = refPts[0].lap;
    for (var i = 0; i < refPts.length; i++) {
      var p = refPts[i];
      if (p.lap !== prevLap2) {
        if (cur2.length > 0) refLaps.push(cur2);
        cur2 = [];
        prevLap2 = p.lap;
      }
      cur2.push({ distance: p.distance, value: p.value });
    }
    if (cur2.length > 0) refLaps.push(cur2);
    if (refLaps.length > 0) {
      refLaps = [refLaps[refLaps.length - 1]];
    } else {
      refLaps = [refPts.map(function(p2) {
        return { distance: p2.distance, value: p2.value };
      })];
    }
  }
  var xRange = trackLength || 4655;
  var yRanges = { speed: [0, 360], rpm: [0, 15e3], n_gear: [0, 8], throttle: [0, 100], brake: [0, 1] };
  var minV, maxV;
  var fixedRange = yRanges[yKey];
  if (fixedRange) {
    minV = fixedRange[0];
    maxV = fixedRange[1];
  } else {
    minV = Infinity;
    maxV = -Infinity;
    for (var li = 0; li < laps.length; li++) {
      for (var pi = 0; pi < laps[li].length; pi++) {
        var vv = laps[li][pi].value;
        if (vv < minV) minV = vv;
        if (vv > maxV) maxV = vv;
      }
    }
  }
  var vRange = maxV - minV || 1;
  var polylineData = laps.map(function(lap, li2) {
    var opacity = laps.length === 1 ? 1 : 0.25 + 0.75 * (li2 + 1) / laps.length;
    var pts2;
    if (step) {
      pts2 = [];
      var prevY = null;
      for (var pi2 = 0; pi2 < lap.length; pi2++) {
        var x = pad.left + lap[pi2].distance / xRange * iw;
        var y = pad.top + ih - (lap[pi2].value - minV) / vRange * ih;
        if (prevY != null) pts2.push(x + "," + prevY);
        pts2.push(x + "," + y);
        prevY = y;
      }
    } else {
      pts2 = lap.map(function(p2) {
        var x2 = pad.left + p2.distance / xRange * iw;
        var y2 = pad.top + ih - (p2.value - minV) / vRange * ih;
        return x2 + "," + y2;
      });
    }
    var points = pts2.join(" ");
    var fillPoints = null;
    if (step && fill) {
      var yZero = pad.top + ih - (0 - minV) / vRange * ih;
      var fpts = [];
      var firstX = lap.length > 0 ? pad.left + lap[0].distance / xRange * iw : pad.left;
      var lastX = lap.length > 0 ? pad.left + lap[lap.length - 1].distance / xRange * iw : pad.left + iw;
      fpts.push(firstX + "," + yZero);
      var fprevY = null;
      for (var pi2 = 0; pi2 < lap.length; pi2++) {
        var x = pad.left + lap[pi2].distance / xRange * iw;
        var y = pad.top + ih - (lap[pi2].value - minV) / vRange * ih;
        if (fprevY != null) fpts.push(x + "," + fprevY);
        fpts.push(x + "," + y);
        fprevY = y;
      }
      fpts.push(lastX + "," + yZero);
      fillPoints = fpts.join(" ");
    }
    return { points, fillPoints, opacity };
  });
  var refPolylineData = null;
  if (refLaps && refLaps.length > 0 && refLaps[0].length > 1 && laps && laps.length > 0 && laps[0].length > 1) {
    var refSorted = refLaps[0].slice().sort(function(a, b) {
      return a.distance - b.distance;
    });
    var mainLine = laps[0];
    var refInterpolated = [];
    var refIdx = 0;
    for (var mi = 0; mi < mainLine.length; mi++) {
      var targetDist = mainLine[mi].distance;
      while (refIdx < refSorted.length - 1 && refSorted[refIdx + 1].distance < targetDist) {
        refIdx++;
      }
      if (refIdx < refSorted.length - 1) {
        var p0 = refSorted[refIdx];
        var p1 = refSorted[refIdx + 1];
        if (p1.distance - p0.distance > 1e-3) {
          var t = (targetDist - p0.distance) / (p1.distance - p0.distance);
          var interpVal = p0.value + t * (p1.value - p0.value);
          refInterpolated.push({ distance: targetDist, value: interpVal });
        }
      }
    }
    if (refInterpolated.length > 1) {
      var refPoints = refInterpolated.map(function(p2) {
        var x = pad.left + p2.distance / xRange * iw;
        var y = pad.top + ih - (p2.value - minV) / vRange * ih;
        return x + "," + y;
      }).join(" ");
      refPolylineData = { points: refPoints };
    }
  }
  var yTicks = 4;
  var tickLabels = [];
  for (var t = 0; t <= yTicks; t++) {
    var val = minV + vRange * t / yTicks;
    var yy = pad.top + ih - t / yTicks * ih;
    tickLabels.push({ val: vRange > 2 ? val.toFixed(0) : val.toFixed(1), y: yy });
  }
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { ref: containerRef, style: { width: "100%" }, children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("svg", { viewBox: "0 0 " + Math.ceil(chartWidth) + " " + Math.ceil(h), style: { width: "100%", height: h, overflow: "visible" }, children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("text", { x: chartWidth / 2, y: 12, textAnchor: "middle", fill: "var(--text2)", fontSize: "10", fontWeight: "600", children: label }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 653,
      columnNumber: 9
    }, this),
    tickLabels.map(function(t2, i2) {
      return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("line", { x1: pad.left, y1: t2.y, x2: chartWidth - pad.right, y2: t2.y, stroke: "var(--border)", strokeWidth: "0.3" }, "g" + i2, false, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 657,
        columnNumber: 18
      }, this);
    }),
    tickLabels.map(function(t2, i2) {
      return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("text", { x: pad.left - 4, y: t2.y + 3, textAnchor: "end", fill: "var(--text2)", fontSize: "8", children: t2.val }, "l" + i2, false, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 663,
        columnNumber: 18
      }, this);
    }),
    corners ? corners.map(function(c, i2) {
      var cx = pad.left + c.distance / xRange * iw;
      if (cx < pad.left || cx > chartWidth - pad.right) return null;
      return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("g", { children: [
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("line", { x1: cx, y1: pad.top, x2: cx, y2: pad.top + ih, stroke: "var(--text2)", strokeWidth: "0.5", strokeDasharray: "2,3", opacity: "0.4" }, void 0, false, {

          columnNumber: 11

_s(TelemetryChart, "shz0KPTDy9qmSrmt9JBl+pwJgQw=");
_c4 = TelemetryChart;
function TelemetryDeltaChart({ mainData, refData, height, trackLength }) {
  _s2();
  var containerRef = useRef(null);
  var [chartWidth, setChartWidth] = useState(500);
  useEffect(function() {
    function measure() {
      if (containerRef.current) {
        var w = containerRef.current.getBoundingClientRect().width;
        if (w > 0) setChartWidth(w);
      }
    }
    measure();
    window.addEventListener("resize", measure);
    return function() {
      window.removeEventListener("resize", measure);
    };
  }, []);
  var refSorted = (refData || []).filter(function(p2) {
    return p2.speed != null && p2.distance != null;
  }).sort(function(a, b) {
    return a.distance - b.distance;
  });
  var mainPts = (mainData || []).filter(function(p2) {
    return p2.speed != null && p2.distance != null;
  }).sort(function(a, b) {
    return a.distance - b.distance;
  });
  function _latestLap(arr) {
    var mx2 = -1;
    for (var i2 = 0; i2 < arr.length; i2++) {
      if (arr[i2].lap != null && arr[i2].lap > mx2) mx2 = arr[i2].lap;
    }
    if (mx2 < 0) return arr;
    var latest = arr.filter(function(p2) {
      return p2.lap === mx2;
    });
    if (latest.length < 10 && mx2 > 0) {
      var prev = arr.filter(function(p2) {
        return p2.lap === mx2 - 1;
      });
      if (prev.length > 0) return prev.sort(function(a, b) {
        return a.distance - b.distance;
      });
    }
    return latest.sort(function(a, b) {
      return a.distance - b.distance;
    });
  }
  var _allMain = mainPts;
  var _allRef = refSorted;
  mainPts = _latestLap(_allMain);
  refSorted = _latestLap(_allRef);
  var mLap = mainPts.length > 0 ? mainPts[0].lap : -1;
  var rLap = refSorted.length > 0 ? refSorted[0].lap : -1;
  if (mLap > 0 && rLap > 0 && mLap !== rLap) {
    var commonLap = Math.min(mLap, rLap);
    mainPts = _allMain.filter(function(p2) {
      return p2.lap != null && p2.lap === commonLap;
    }).sort(function(a, b) {
      return a.distance - b.distance;
    });
    refSorted = _allRef.filter(function(p2) {
      return p2.lap != null && p2.lap === commonLap;
    }).sort(function(a, b) {
      return a.distance - b.distance;
    });
  }
  var _maxRef = refSorted.length > 0 ? refSorted[refSorted.length - 1].distance : 0;
  mainPts = mainPts.filter(function(p2, idx, a) {
    return p2.distance <= _maxRef;
  });
  if (mainPts.length >= 3) {
    mainPts = mainPts.map(function(p2, i2) {
      var s = p2.speed, c = 1;
      if (i2 > 0) {
        s += mainPts[i2 - 1].speed;
        c++;
      }
      if (i2 < mainPts.length - 1) {
        s += mainPts[i2 + 1].speed;
        c++;
      }
      return { distance: p2.distance, speed: s / c, lap: p2.lap };
    });
  }
  if (refSorted.length >= 3) {
    refSorted = refSorted.map(function(p2, i2) {
      var s = p2.speed, c = 1;
      if (i2 > 0) {
        s += refSorted[i2 - 1].speed;
        c++;
      }
      if (i2 < refSorted.length - 1) {
        s += refSorted[i2 + 1].speed;
        c++;
      }
      return { distance: p2.distance, speed: s / c, lap: p2.lap };
    });
  }
  if (refSorted.length < 2 || mainPts.length < 2) {
    var _h = height || 140;
    return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { ref: containerRef, style: { width: "100%" }, children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("svg", { viewBox: "0 0 " + Math.ceil(chartWidth) + " " + Math.ceil(_h), style: { width: "100%", height: _h }, children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("text", { x: chartWidth / 2, y: _h / 2, textAnchor: "middle", fill: "var(--text2)", fontSize: "12", children: "Select main & reference driver for delta" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 837,
      columnNumber: 238
    }, this) }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 837,
      columnNumber: 132
    }, this) }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 837,
      columnNumber: 82
    }, this);
  }
  function interpRef(d) {
    if (d <= refSorted[0].distance) return refSorted[0].speed;
    if (d >= refSorted[refSorted.length - 1].distance) return refSorted[refSorted.length - 1].speed;
    for (var i2 = 0; i2 < refSorted.length - 1; i2++) {
      if (d >= refSorted[i2].distance && d <= refSorted[i2 + 1].distance) {
        var t2 = (d - refSorted[i2].distance) / (refSorted[i2 + 1].distance - refSorted[i2].distance);
        return refSorted[i2].speed + t2 * (refSorted[i2 + 1].speed - refSorted[i2].speed);
      }
    }
    return null;
  }
  var pts = [];
  var cumTime = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < mainPts.length; i++) {
    var p = mainPts[i];
    var refSpd = interpRef(p.distance);
    var dSpeed = p.speed - refSpd;
    if (i > 0) {
      var ds = p.distance - mainPts[i - 1].distance;
      if (ds > 0 && p.speed > 0 && refSpd > 0) {
        var avgMain = (mainPts[i - 1].speed + p.speed) / 2;
        cumTime += 3.6 * ds * (refSpd - avgMain) / (avgMain * refSpd);
      }
    }
    pts.push({ dist: p.distance, ds: dSpeed, ct: cumTime });
  }
  if (pts.length < 2) {
    var _h2 = height || 140;
    return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { ref: containerRef, style: { width: "100%" }, children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("svg", { viewBox: "0 0 " + Math.ceil(chartWidth) + " " + Math.ceil(_h2), style: { width: "100%", height: _h2 }, children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("text", { x: chartWidth / 2, y: _h2 / 2, textAnchor: "middle", fill: "var(--text2)", fontSize: "12", children: "Insufficient data" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 891,
      columnNumber: 213
    }, this) }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 891,
      columnNumber: 105
    }, this) }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 891,
      columnNumber: 55
    }, this);
  }
  var h = height || 140;
  var p = { t: 28, r: 44, b: 20, l: 40 };
  var xRange = trackLength || 4655;
  var cw = chartWidth - p.l - p.r;
  var ch = h - p.t - p.b;
  var da = 100;
  var tmn = -2;
  var tmx = 2;
  var tr = tmx - tmn;
  var dr = 2 * da;
  var zy = p.t + ch - (0 - -da) / dr * ch;
  function mx(d) {
    return p.l + d / xRange * cw;
  }
  function my(v, mn, rng) {
    return p.t + ch - (v - mn) / rng * ch;
  }
  var segs = [];
  var cur = { sgn: null, xys: [] };
  for (var i = 0; i < pts.length; i++) {
    var clippedDs = Math.min(da, Math.max(-da, pts[i].ds));
    var sgn = clippedDs >= 0 ? 1 : -1;
    var xpt = { x: mx(pts[i].dist), y: my(clippedDs, -da, dr), v: clippedDs };
    if (cur.sgn !== null && cur.sgn !== sgn) {
      if (cur.xys.length > 1) {
        segs.push({ xys: cur.xys, sgn: cur.sgn });
      }
      cur = { sgn, xys: [xpt] };
    } else {
      cur.xys.push(xpt);
    }
  }
  if (cur.xys.length > 1) segs.push({ xys: cur.xys, sgn: cur.sgn });
  var spdStr = pts.map(function(x) {
    return mx(x.dist) + "," + my(x.ds, -da, dr);
  }).join(" ");
  var timStr = pts.map(function(x) {
    return mx(x.dist) + "," + my(x.ct, tmn, tr);
  }).join(" ");
  var _blockClr = pts.length > 0 && pts[pts.length - 1].ds > 0 ? "#27c93f" : pts.length > 0 && pts[pts.length - 1].ds < 0 ? "#e10600" : "#8b949e";
  var ytks = [];
  for (var t = 0; t <= 4; t++) {
    var val = -da + dr * t / 4;
    ytks.push({ val: val.toFixed(1), y: my(val, -da, dr) });
  }
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { ref: containerRef, style: { width: "100%" }, children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("svg", { viewBox: "0 0 " + Math.ceil(chartWidth) + " " + Math.ceil(h), style: { width: "100%", height: h, overflow: "visible" }, children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("text", { x: chartWidth / 2, y: 12, textAnchor: "middle", fill: "var(--text2)", fontSize: "10", fontWeight: "600", children: "Delta" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 965,
      columnNumber: 10
    }, this),
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("rect", { x: chartWidth - p.r - 18, y: 2, width: 18, height: 18, rx: 3, fill: _blockClr }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 967,
      columnNumber: 10
    }, this),
    ytks.map(function(t2, i2) {
      return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("line", { x1: p.l, y1: t2.y, x2: chartWidth - p.r, y2: t2.y, stroke: "var(--border)", strokeWidth: "0.3" }, "g" + i2, false, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 969,
        columnNumber: 44
      }, this);
    }),
    ytks.map(function(t2, i2) {
      return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("text", { x: p.l - 4, y: t2.y + 3, textAnchor: "end", fill: "var(--text2)", fontSize: "8", children: t2.val }, "l" + i2, false, {

    }),
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("line", { x1: p.l, y1: zy, x2: chartWidth - p.r, y2: zy, stroke: "var(--text2)", strokeWidth: "0.5", strokeDasharray: "3,3" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 973,
      columnNumber: 10
    }, this),
    segs.map(function(s, i2) {
      var fill = s.xys.map(function(x) {
        return x.x + "," + x.y;
      }).join(" ");

      var selCar = cars.find((c) => c.number === selectedDriver);
      if (!selCar) return null;
      var speedMs = 80;
      var lossDist = pitMedian * speedMs;
      var lossAngleDeg = lossDist / trackLength * 360;
      var exitAngle = (selCar.angle - lossAngleDeg + 360) % 360;

function TelemetryPanel({ carData, positions, driverNumber }) {

_c6 = TelemetryPanel;
function RaceRing({ trackPositions, drivers, selectedDriver: selectedDriver2, onSelectDriver, lapCount, trackStatus, timing, pitMedian: pitMedian2, trackLength, pitLossAvailable, appData, stintHistory, circuit, raceControl }) {
  const started = lapCount && lapCount.current_lap >= 1;
  const redFlag = trackStatus?.status?.includes("Red");
  var raceMsgs = raceControl || [];
  var hasActiveSC = (() => {
    var currentLap = lapCount && lapCount.current_lap || 0;
    for (var ri = raceMsgs.length - 1; ri >= 0; ri--) {
      var msg = raceMsgs[ri];
      if (msg && msg.category === "SafetyCar") {
        if (msg.lap != null && msg.lap > currentLap) continue;
        var m = (msg.message || "").toUpperCase();
        if (m.includes("END")) return null;
        if (m.includes("VSC")) return "VSC";
        return "SC";
      }
    }
    if (trackStatus?.status?.includes("SafetyCar")) return "SC";
    if (trackStatus?.status?.includes("VirtualSafetyCar")) return "VSC";
    return null;
  })();
  const isSC = hasActiveSC === "SC";
  const isVSC = hasActiveSC === "VSC";
  const cars2 = (trackPositions || []).map((tp) => {
    return { number: tp.driver_number, angle: tp.angle || 0, color: teamColor(drivers[tp.driver_number]?.team_colour), tla: tp.tla || tp.driver_number };
  });
  const gapByDriver = {};
  if (timing) {
    timing.forEach((t) => {
      gapByDriver[t.driver_number] = t.gap_to_leader;
    });
  }
  const R2 = 68;
  const CX2 = 80;
  const CY2 = 80;
  const compoundColors = { SOFT: "#da291c", HARD: "#ffffff", MEDIUM: "#ffd700", INTERMEDIATE: "#4caf50", WET: "#2196f3" };
  const stintComps = stintHistory && selectedDriver2 != null ? stintHistory[selectedDriver2] || stintHistory[String(selectedDriver2)] || [] : [];
  const currentCompound = appData && selectedDriver2 && appData[selectedDriver2] && appData[selectedDriver2].compound || null;
  function polar(a, r) {
    var rad = (a - 90) * Math.PI / 180;
    return [CX2 + r * Math.cos(rad), CY2 + r * Math.sin(rad)];
  }
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "track-map" + (isSC || isVSC ? " safety-car-active" : ""), children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { style: { position: "absolute", top: 6, left: 6, zIndex: 2, display: "flex", gap: 4, pointerEvents: "none" }, children: [
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { style: {
        display: "flex",
        flexDirection: "column",
        alignItems: "center",
        border: isSC ? "1px solid #ffd700" : "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
        borderRadius: 4,
        padding: "2px 7px",
        lineHeight: 1.2,
        transition: "all 0.4s",
        background: isSC ? "rgba(255,215,0,0.12)" : "var(--surface)"
      }, children: [
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { style: { fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 900, color: isSC ? "#ffd700" : "var(--text2)", lineHeight: 1 }, children: "SC" }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
          lineNumber: 1161,
          columnNumber: 15
        }, this),
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { style: { fontSize: 6, fontWeight: 600, color: isSC ? "#ffd700" : "var(--text2)", letterSpacing: "0.5px", lineHeight: 1 }, children: "SAFETY CAR" }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",

        }, this)

      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("circle", { cx: CX2, cy: CY2, r: R2, fill: "none", stroke: "var(--border)", strokeWidth: "12", opacity: 0.4 }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 1203,
        columnNumber: 10
      }, this),
      (() => {
        const circumference = 2 * Math.PI * R2;
        var parsed = (stintComps || []).map(function(s) {
          return typeof s === "string" ? { compound: s, lap_count: 1 } : { compound: s.compound, lap_count: s.lap_count || 1 };
        });
        var curLap = lapCount ? lapCount.current_lap || 0 : 0;
        var doneLaps = parsed.reduce(function(a, s) {
          return a + s.lap_count;
        }, 0);
        var curEst = curLap - doneLaps;
        if (currentCompound && curEst > 0) {
          parsed.push({ compound: currentCompound, lap_count: curEst });
        }
        if (parsed.length === 0) {
          return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("circle", { cx: CX2, cy: CY2, r: R2, fill: "none", stroke: "#30363d", strokeWidth: 12, opacity: 0.15 }, void 0, false, {
            fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
            lineNumber: 1227,
            columnNumber: 20
          }, this);
        }
        var totalLaps = parsed.reduce(function(a, s) {
          return a + s.lap_count;
        }, 0);
        var raceTotal = lapCount ? lapCount.total_laps || 0 : 0;
        var denom = raceTotal > 0 ? raceTotal : Math.max(totalLaps, 60);
        var off = 0;
        return parsed.map(function(s, i) {
          var segLen = Math.max(s.lap_count / denom * circumference, 2);
          var startAngle = off / circumference * 360;
          var endAngle = (off + segLen) / circumference * 360;
          off += segLen;
          var sa = (startAngle - 90) * Math.PI / 180;
          var ea = (endAngle - 90) * Math.PI / 180;
          var x1 = CX2 + R2 * Math.cos(sa);
          var y1 = CY2 + R2 * Math.sin(sa);
          var x2 = CX2 + R2 * Math.cos(ea);
          var y2 = CY2 + R2 * Math.sin(ea);
          var la = endAngle - startAngle > 180 ? 1 : 0;
          var d = "M " + x1.toFixed(2) + " " + y1.toFixed(2) + " A " + R2 + " " + R2 + " 0 " + la + " 1 " + x2.toFixed(2) + " " + y2.toFixed(2);

            fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
            lineNumber: 1269,
            columnNumber: 20
          }, this);
        });
      })(),
      (() => {
        const splits = circuit && circuit.sector_splits;

          splits.s1 / tLen * 360,

      }),
      pitMedian2 != null && selectedDriver2 && trackPositions && trackLength && (() => {
        var entry = trackPositions.find((tp) => tp.driver_number === selectedDriver2);
        if (!entry || !entry.pit_window_delta) return null;
        var pwd = entry.pit_window_delta;
        var minDist = (typeof pwd === "object" ? pwd.min : pwd) || 0;
        var maxDist = (typeof pwd === "object" ? pwd.max : pwd) || 0;
        if (minDist <= 0) return null;
        var R_ARC = R2 + 5;
        var a = entry.angle || 0;
        var arcAngleMin = Math.min(360, minDist / trackLength * 360);
        if (arcAngleMin <= 1) return null;
        var saMin = (a - arcAngleMin + 360) % 360;
        var srMin = (saMin - 90) * Math.PI / 180;
        var erMin = (a - 90) * Math.PI / 180;
        var x1Min = CX2 + R_ARC * Math.cos(srMin);
        var y1Min = CY2 + R_ARC * Math.sin(srMin);
        var x2Min = CX2 + R_ARC * Math.cos(erMin);
        var y2Min = CY2 + R_ARC * Math.sin(erMin);
        var laMin = arcAngleMin > 180 ? 1 : 0;
        var dMin = "M " + x1Min + " " + y1Min + " A " + R_ARC + " " + R_ARC + " 0 " + laMin + " 1 " + x2Min + " " + y2Min;
        var hasMax = maxDist > minDist;
        var dMax = null;
        if (hasMax) {
          var arcAngleMax = Math.min(360, maxDist / trackLength * 360);
          if (arcAngleMax > 1 && Math.abs(arcAngleMax - arcAngleMin) > 0.5) {
            var saMax = (a - arcAngleMax + 360) % 360;
            var srMax = (saMax - 90) * Math.PI / 180;
            var erMax = (a - 90) * Math.PI / 180;
            var x1Max = CX2 + R_ARC * Math.cos(srMax);
            var y1Max = CY2 + R_ARC * Math.sin(srMax);
            var x2Max = CX2 + R_ARC * Math.cos(erMax);
            var y2Max = CY2 + R_ARC * Math.sin(erMax);
            var laMax = arcAngleMax > 180 ? 1 : 0;
            dMax = "M " + x1Max + " " + y1Max + " A " + R_ARC + " " + R_ARC + " 0 " + laMax + " 1 " + x2Max + " " + y2Max;
          }
        }
        return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(Fragment, { children: [
          /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("path", { d: dMin, fill: "none", stroke: "#ff8800", strokeWidth: "3", strokeLinecap: "round", opacity: "1" }, void 0, false, {
            fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
            lineNumber: 1497,
            columnNumber: 14
          }, this),
          dMax && /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("path", { d: dMax, fill: "none", stroke: "#ff8800", strokeWidth: "2", strokeLinecap: "round", opacity: "0.4", strokeDasharray: "3,3" }, void 0, false, {
            fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
            lineNumber: 1499,
            columnNumber: 23
          }, this)
        ] }, void 0, true, {
          fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
          lineNumber: 1495,
          columnNumber: 18
        }, this);
      })()
    ] }, void 0, true, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 1201,
      columnNumber: 7
    }, this)
  ] }, void 0, true, {
    fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
    lineNumber: 1147,
    columnNumber: 5
  }, this);
}

function WeatherPanel({ weather }) {
  if (!weather) return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "no-session", children: "No weather data" }, void 0, false, {

      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { className: "value", children: [
        weather.air_temperature?.toFixed(1),
        "°C"
      ] }, void 0, true, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 1527,
        columnNumber: 37
      }, this),
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { className: "label", children: "Air Temp" }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 1527,
        columnNumber: 107
      }, this)
    ] }, void 0, true, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 1527,
      columnNumber: 7
    }, this),
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "weather-item", children: [
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { className: "value", children: [
        weather.track_temperature?.toFixed(1),
        "°C"
      ] }, void 0, true, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 1529,
        columnNumber: 37
      }, this),
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { className: "label", children: "Track Temp" }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 1529,
        columnNumber: 109
      }, this)
    ] }, void 0, true, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 1529,
      columnNumber: 7
    }, this),

function RaceControl({ messages }) {
  if (!messages || messages.length === 0) {
    return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "no-session", style: { height: 80 }, children: "No messages" }, void 0, false, {

      lineNumber: 1553,
      columnNumber: 12
    }, this);
  }

    (m, i) => /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "rc-message", children: [
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { className: "rc-flag " + (m.flag?.toLowerCase() || ""), children: m.flag || "INFO" }, void 0, false, {

      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { style: { color: "#8b949e", fontSize: 10 }, children: m.lap ? "L" + m.lap : "" }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 1569,
        columnNumber: 11
      }, this)

      columnNumber: 7
    }, this)

_c9 = RaceControl;
function GGDiagram({ data, height }) {
  _s3();
  var containerRef = useRef(null);
  var [chartWidth, setChartWidth] = useState(400);
  useEffect(function() {
    function measure() {
      if (containerRef.current) {
        var rect = containerRef.current.getBoundingClientRect();
        if (rect.width > 0) setChartWidth(rect.width);
      }
    }
    measure();
    window.addEventListener("resize", measure);
    return function() {
      window.removeEventListener("resize", measure);
    };
  }, [height]);
  if (!data || data.length < 3) {
    return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { ref: containerRef, className: "no-session", style: { height: height || 250 }, children: "Collecting G-G data..." }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 1615,
      columnNumber: 12
    }, this);
  }
  var h = height || chartWidth;
  var pad = { top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 24, left: 24 };
  var iw = chartWidth - pad.left - pad.right;
  var ih = h - pad.top - pad.bottom;
  var gRangeX = 0.5;
  var cx = pad.left + iw / 2;
  var cy = pad.top + ih / 2;
  function toX(g) {
    return cx + g / gRangeX * (iw / 2);
  }
  function toY(g) {
    return cy + (g < 0 ? g / 5 : g / 2) * (ih / 2);
  }
  var refRx = 0.5 / gRangeX * (iw / 2);
  var refRy = 0.5 / 5 * (ih / 2);
  var ptR = Math.max(1, Math.min(2.5, 300 / data.length));
  var n = data.length;
  var pts = data.map(function(p, i) {
    return { x: toX(p.lat), y: toY(p.lon), a: 0.4 + 0.6 * (i / n) };
  });
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { ref: containerRef, style: { width: "100%" }, children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("svg", { viewBox: "0 0 " + Math.ceil(chartWidth) + " " + Math.ceil(h), style: { width: "100%", height: h }, children: [
    [-0.5, -0.25, 0, 0.25, 0.5].map(function(v) {
      return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("line", { x1: toX(v), y1: pad.top, x2: toX(v), y2: pad.top + ih, stroke: "var(--border)", strokeWidth: "0.4" }, "gx" + v, false, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 1653,
        columnNumber: 63
      }, this);
    }),
    [-5, -4, -3, -2, -1, 0, 0.5, 1, 1.5, 2].map(function(v) {
      return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("line", { x1: pad.left, y1: toY(v), x2: pad.left + iw, y2: toY(v), stroke: "var(--border)", strokeWidth: "0.4" }, "gy" + v, false, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 1655,
        columnNumber: 75
      }, this);
    }),
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("line", { x1: pad.left, y1: cy, x2: pad.left + iw, y2: cy, stroke: "var(--text2)", strokeWidth: "0.6" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 1657,
      columnNumber: 9
    }, this),
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("line", { x1: cx, y1: pad.top, x2: cx, y2: pad.top + ih, stroke: "var(--text2)", strokeWidth: "0.6" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 1659,
      columnNumber: 9
    }, this),
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("ellipse", { cx, cy, rx: refRx, ry: refRy, fill: "none", stroke: "var(--text2)", strokeWidth: "0.4", strokeDasharray: "3,3", opacity: "0.3" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 1661,
      columnNumber: 9
    }, this),
    pts.map(function(p, i) {
      return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("circle", { cx: p.x, cy: p.y, r: ptR, fill: "#58a6ff", opacity: p.a }, i, false, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 1663,
        columnNumber: 41
      }, this);
    }),
    pts.length > 0 ? /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("circle", { cx: pts[pts.length - 1].x, cy: pts[pts.length - 1].y, r: 5, fill: "#ff4444", stroke: "#fff", strokeWidth: "1.5" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 1665,
      columnNumber: 27
    }, this) : null,
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("text", { x: cx, y: h - 4, textAnchor: "middle", fill: "var(--text2)", fontSize: "8", children: "Lateral G" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 1667,
      columnNumber: 9
    }, this),
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("text", { x: 10, y: cy + 3, textAnchor: "start", fill: "var(--text2)", fontSize: "8", children: "Brake →" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 1669,
      columnNumber: 9
    }, this),
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("text", { x: chartWidth - 10, y: pad.top + 2, textAnchor: "end", fill: "#8b949e", fontSize: "7", opacity: "0.6", children: "+5G" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 1670,
      columnNumber: 9
    }, this),
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("text", { x: pad.left, y: pad.top + ih + 10, textAnchor: "start", fill: "#8b949e", fontSize: "7", opacity: "0.6", children: "-2G" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",

    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("text", { x: chartWidth - 10, y: h - 14, textAnchor: "end", fill: "#8b949e", fontSize: "7", opacity: "0.6", children: "+0.5G" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 1674,
      columnNumber: 9
    }, this),
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("text", { x: pad.left, y: h - 14, textAnchor: "start", fill: "#8b949e", fontSize: "7", opacity: "0.6", children: "-0.5G" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
      lineNumber: 1676,
      columnNumber: 9
    }, this)
  ] }, void 0, true, {
    fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
    lineNumber: 1651,

function GeneralView({ snapshot, selectedDriver: selectedDriver2, onSelectDriver, trackPositions }) {
  _s4();
  if (!snapshot) return null;
  const { session, drivers, timing_sorted, app_data, positions, weather, race_control, lap_count, track_status, pit_median, circuit, pit_loss_available, stint_history } = snapshot;
  const [apiRaceControl, setApiRaceControl] = useState(null);
  useEffect(() => {
    var attempts = 0;
    var maxAttempts = 5;
    var timer;
    function tryFetch() {
      fetch("/api/race_control").then(function(r) {
        return r.json();
      }).then(function(data) {
        if (data && data.length > 0) {
          setApiRaceControl(data);
        } else if (++attempts < maxAttempts) {
          timer = setTimeout(tryFetch, 2e3);
        }
      }).catch(function() {
        if (++attempts < maxAttempts) {
          timer = setTimeout(tryFetch, 2e3);
        }
      });
    }
    tryFetch();
    return function() {
      if (timer) clearTimeout(timer);
    };
  }, []);
  const effectiveRaceControl = race_control && race_control.length > 0 ? race_control : apiRaceControl || [];
  const sessionStatus = session?.session_status === "Started" ? "LIVE" : session?.session_status || "N/A";
  const w = weather;
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(Fragment, { children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "session-bar", children: [
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { className: "meeting", children: session?.meeting_name || "F1" }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",

        columnNumber: 9
      }, this),
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { className: "session", children: session?.session_name || "" }, void 0, false, {

_s4(GeneralView, "oM0gVpG1/VPLOnlbk3Pt4kv/7WM=");
_c1 = GeneralView;
function EngineeringView({ snapshot, selectedDriver: selectedDriver2, onSelectDriver, carDataStream, trackLength, mainDriverRef, refDriverRef, trackPositions }) {
  _s5();
  var [mainDriver, setMainDriver] = useState(null);
  var [refDriver, setRefDriver] = useState(null);
  var [visibleColumns, setVisibleColumns] = useState({ speed: true, throttle: true, brake: true, gear: true, delta: true, rpm: true });
  useEffect(function() {
    if (mainDriverRef && mainDriverRef.current) {
      setMainDriver(mainDriverRef.current);
      if (onSelectDriver) onSelectDriver(mainDriverRef.current);
    }
    if (refDriverRef && refDriverRef.current) {
      setRefDriver(refDriverRef.current);
    }
  }, []);
  useEffect(function() {
    if (selectedDriver2 != null) {
      setMainDriver(selectedDriver2);
    }
  }, [selectedDriver2]);
  var ggDataRef = useRef({});
  var lastGgTsRef = useRef({});
  var lastGgLapRef = useRef({});
  var [, ggUpdate] = useState(0);
  var carDataAccRef = useRef({});
  var lastCarLapRef = useRef({});
  useEffect(function() {
    if (!snapshot?.positions) return;
    var pos = snapshot.positions;
    var updated = false;
    Object.keys(pos).forEach(function(dnStr) {
      var dn = parseInt(dnStr);
      var pts = pos[dnStr];
      if (!pts || pts.length === 0) return;
      var lastTs = lastGgTsRef.current[dn] || 0;
      if (pts.length > 0) {
        var lastPt = pts[pts.length - 1];
        if (lastPt.lap != null) {
          var curLap = lastPt.lap;
          if (lastGgLapRef.current[dn] != null && lastGgLapRef.current[dn] !== curLap) {
            ggDataRef.current[dn] = [];
            lastGgTsRef.current[dn] = 0;
          }
          lastGgLapRef.current[dn] = curLap;
        }
      }
      var dnUpdated = false;
      pts.forEach(function(p) {
        if (p.timestamp > lastTs && p.lateral_g != null && p.longitudinal_g != null) {
          if (!ggDataRef.current[dn]) ggDataRef.current[dn] = [];
          ggDataRef.current[dn].push({ lat: p.lateral_g, lon: p.longitudinal_g });
          dnUpdated = true;
        }
      });
      if (dnUpdated) {
        lastGgTsRef.current[dn] = pts[pts.length - 1].timestamp;
        updated = true;
      }
      if (ggDataRef.current[dn] && ggDataRef.current[dn].length > 500) {
        ggDataRef.current[dn] = ggDataRef.current[dn].slice(-500);
      }
    });
    if (updated) ggUpdate(function(v) {
      return v + 1;
    });
  }, [snapshot]);
  var ggApiFetched = useRef({});
  useEffect(function() {
    if (!mainDriver) return;
    var dn = mainDriver;
    function fetchGG() {
      fetch("/api/positions/" + dn).then(function(r) {
        return r.json();
      }).then(function(pts) {
        if (!pts || pts.length < 3) return;
        var ggPts = [];
        for (var i2 = 0; i2 < pts.length; i2++) {
          var p = pts[i2];
          if (p.lateral_g != null && p.longitudinal_g != null) {
            ggPts.push({ lat: p.lateral_g, lon: p.longitudinal_g });
          }
        }
        if (ggPts.length >= 3) {
          ggDataRef.current[dn] = ggPts;
          ggUpdate(function(v) {
            return v + 1;
          });
        }
      }).catch(function() {
      });
    }
    fetchGG();
    var timer = setInterval(fetchGG, 8e3);
    return function() {
      clearInterval(timer);
    };
  }, [mainDriver]);
  useEffect(function() {
    if (snapshot?.positions) {
      Object.keys(snapshot.positions).forEach(function(dnStr) {
        var pts = snapshot.positions[dnStr];
        if (!pts || pts.length === 0) return;
        var lastPt = pts[pts.length - 1];
        if (lastPt.lap != null && lastCarLapRef.current[dnStr] != null && lastCarLapRef.current[dnStr] !== lastPt.lap) {
          carDataAccRef.current[dnStr] = [];
        }
        lastCarLapRef.current[dnStr] = lastPt.lap;
      });
    }
    if (carDataStream) {
      Object.keys(carDataStream).forEach(function(dnStr) {
        var incoming = carDataStream[dnStr];
        if (!incoming || incoming.length === 0) return;
        if (!carDataAccRef.current[dnStr]) carDataAccRef.current[dnStr] = [];
        var acc = carDataAccRef.current[dnStr];
        var lastTs = acc.length > 0 ? acc[acc.length - 1].timestamp : 0;
        incoming.forEach(function(p) {
          if (p.timestamp > lastTs) {
            acc.push(p);
          }
        });
        if (acc.length > 500) {
          carDataAccRef.current[dnStr] = acc.slice(-500);
        }
      });
    }
  }, [carDataStream, snapshot?.positions]);
  if (!snapshot) return null;
  var session = snapshot.session, drivers = snapshot.drivers || {};
  var timing_sorted = snapshot.timing_sorted, app_data = snapshot.app_data;
  var car_data = snapshot.car_data || {}, lap_count = snapshot.lap_count;
  var stint_history = snapshot.stint_history;
  var corners = snapshot?.circuit?.corners || null;
  var allCarData = {};
  Object.keys(car_data || {}).forEach(function(dn) {
    allCarData[dn] = car_data[dn];
  });
  Object.keys(carDataAccRef.current || {}).forEach(function(dn) {
    if (carDataAccRef.current[dn] && carDataAccRef.current[dn].length >= 2) {
      allCarData[dn] = carDataAccRef.current[dn];
    }
  });
  var teams = {};
  Object.keys(drivers).forEach(function(num) {
    var d = drivers[num];
    var team = d.team_name || "Unknown";
    if (!teams[team]) teams[team] = [];
    teams[team].push({ number: parseInt(num), tla: d.tla, team_name: d.team_name, team_colour: d.team_colour });
  });
  var handleMainChange = function(e) {
    var val = parseInt(e.target.value);
    setMainDriver(val);
    if (mainDriverRef) mainDriverRef.current = val;
    if (onSelectDriver) onSelectDriver(val);
  };
  var handleRefChange = function(e) {
    var val = parseInt(e.target.value) || null;
    setRefDriver(val);
    if (refDriverRef) refDriverRef.current = val;
  };
  var handleToggleColumn = function(key) {
    setVisibleColumns(function(prev) {
      var next = {};
      Object.keys(prev).forEach(function(k) {
        next[k] = prev[k];
      });
      next[key] = !prev[key];
      return next;
    });
  };
  var deltaInfo = null;
  if (mainDriver && refDriver && timing_sorted) {
    var main = null, ref = null;
    for (var i = 0; i < timing_sorted.length; i++) {
      if (timing_sorted[i].driver_number === mainDriver) main = timing_sorted[i];
      if (timing_sorted[i].driver_number === refDriver) ref = timing_sorted[i];
    }
    if (main && ref) {
      var mg = parseFloat(main.gap_to_leader) || 0;
      var rg = parseFloat(ref.gap_to_leader) || 0;
      deltaInfo = (mg - rg).toFixed(3);
    }
  }
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(Fragment, { children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "session-bar", children: [
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { className: "meeting", children: session?.meeting_name || "F1" }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 2108,
        columnNumber: 9
      }, this),
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { className: "session", children: "ENGINEERING" }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 2110,
        columnNumber: 9
      }, this),
      session?.circuit_short && /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { style: { color: "#8b949e" }, children: session.circuit_short }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 2112,
        columnNumber: 36
      }, this),
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { style: { marginLeft: "auto", fontSize: 11, color: "#8b949e" }, children: [

_s5(EngineeringView, "LWl8ybXVGCX1SehQd1Ar1HvhhcQ=");
_c10 = EngineeringView;
function App() {
  _s6();
  const [snapshot, setSnapshot] = useState(null);
  const [selectedDriver2, setSelectedDriver] = useState(null);
  const handleSelectDriver = useCallback((driverNumber) => {
    setSelectedDriver((prev) => prev === driverNumber ? null : driverNumber);
  }, []);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("general");
  const [carDataStream, setCarDataStream] = useState({});
  const [trackLength, setTrackLength] = useState(4655);
  const [trackPositions, setTrackPositions] = useState([]);
  const [theme, setTheme] = useState("dark");
  const mainDriverRef = useRef(null);
  const refDriverRef = useRef(null);
  const snapRef = useRef(null);
  useEffect(() => {
    document.documentElement.setAttribute("data-theme", theme);
  }, [theme]);
  const handleMessage = useCallback((msg) => {
    const updateTypes = ["timing_sorted", "timing", "positions", "car_data", "weather", "track_status", "session", "drivers", "lap_count", "race_control", "app_data", "stint_history", "circuit"];
    if (msg.type === "snapshot") {
      if (msg.data) {
        setSnapshot(msg.data);
        snapRef.current = msg.data;
        if (msg.data?.circuit?.length_m) setTrackLength(msg.data.circuit.length_m);
      }
    } else if (msg.type === "car_data") {
      setCarDataStream(msg.data || {});
      return;
    } else if (msg.type === "track_positions") {
      setTrackPositions(msg.data || []);
    } else if (msg.type === "timing" && snapRef.current) {
      if (Array.isArray(msg.data)) {
        snapRef.current = {
          ...snapRef.current,
          timing_sorted: msg.data
        };
        setSnapshot({ ...snapRef.current });
      }
    } else if (msg.type === "circuit") {
      if (msg.data?.length_m) setTrackLength(msg.data.length_m);
      if (snapRef.current) {
        snapRef.current = { ...snapRef.current, circuit: msg.data };
        setSnapshot({ ...snapRef.current });
      }
    } else if (updateTypes.includes(msg.type) && snapRef.current) {
      snapRef.current = { ...snapRef.current, [msg.type]: msg.data };
      setSnapshot({ ...snapRef.current });
    }
  }, []);
  const { connected } = useWebSocket(handleMessage);
  useEffect(() => {
    fetchSnapshot().then((data) => {
      setSnapshot(data);
      snapRef.current = data;
      if (data?.circuit?.length_m) setTrackLength(data.circuit.length_m);
    }).catch(() => {
    });
    fetch("/api/status").then((r) => r.json()).then((d) => {
      if (d.track_length) setTrackLength(d.track_length);
    }).catch(() => {
    });
  }, []);
  useEffect(function() {
    var timer = setInterval(function() {
      fetch("/api/circuit").then(function(r) {
        return r.json();
      }).then(function(data) {
        if (data && data.corners) {
          setTrackLength(data.length_m);
          setSnapshot(function(prev) {
            return { ...prev, circuit: data };
          });
          clearInterval(timer);
        }
      }).catch(function() {
      });
    }, 5e3);
    return function() {
      clearInterval(timer);
    };
  }, []);
  if (!snapshot) {
    return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "app", children: [
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "header", children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("h1", { children: [
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { children: "VENTO" }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
          lineNumber: 2390,
          columnNumber: 37
        }, this),
        " TIMING"
      ] }, void 0, true, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 2390,
        columnNumber: 33
      }, this) }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 2390,
        columnNumber: 9
      }, this),
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "loading-bar active" }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 2392,
        columnNumber: 9
      }, this),
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "no-session", style: { height: "60vh" }, children: "Connecting to F1 live timing feed..." }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx",
        lineNumber: 2394,
        columnNumber: 9
      }, this)
    ] }, void 0, true, {

  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("D:/Vento_Timing/frontend/src/App.jsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
